title: GPU Usage and Costs Overview
description: Monitor GPU compute spend across AWS, Azure, and GCP including spend breakdowns by instance type and team, pricing coverage, unused capacity, and cost attribution.

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances")) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances")) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances")) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

formulas.formula: ((query1 + query2 + query3) - (timeshift(query4, -2592000) + timeshift(query5, -2592000) + timeshift(query6, -2592000))) / (timeshift(query4, -2592000) + timeshift(query5, -2592000) + timeshift(query6, -2592000)) * 100

queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances")) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

definition.title: Total GPU Spend by Cloud Provider

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances")) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances")) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

definition.content: AWS GPU instances include the **GPU instance** and **Machine Learning ASIC Instances** families (p3, p4, p5, g4, g5, g6, inf1, inf2, trn1, dl1, etc.). Coverage shows On-Demand vs committed spend. OD% tracks how much GPU spend is at on-demand rates.

definition.title: AWS GPU Coverage by Cost Type

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{providername IN (aws) AND aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {aws_cost_type}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:all.cost{providername IN (aws) AND aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND aws_cost_type:Usage AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{providername IN (aws) AND aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, daily)

definition.title: AWS GPU Spend by Instance Type

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND aws_operation:RunInstances AND aws_usage_type:*BoxUsage* AND is_aws_ec2_compute_on_demand:true AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {aws_instance_type}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND aws_operation:RunInstances AND aws_usage_type:*BoxUsage* AND NOT is_aws_ec2_compute_on_demand:true AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {aws_instance_type}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND aws_operation:RunInstances AND aws_usage_type:*Unused* AND NOT is_aws_ec2_compute_on_demand:true AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {aws_instance_type}

definition.title: AWS GPU Spend by Machine Type (Daily)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{providername IN (aws) AND aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {aws_instance_type}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{providername IN (aws) AND aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {team}.rollup(sum, monthly)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

definition.content: Azure GPU VMs are identified by **N-series** meter subcategories (NC, ND, NV families). Coverage is broken down by pricing term: On-Demand, Savings Plan, and Spot. OD% tracks the proportion of GPU spend at on-demand pricing.

definition.title: Azure GPU Spend by Coverage Type (Daily)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {azure_pricing_term}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND azure_pricing_term:OnDemand AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, daily)

definition.title: Azure GPU Spend by Instance Type

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND azure_pricing_term:OnDemand AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {metersubcategory,azure_instance_type}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND azure_pricing_term:SavingsPlan AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {metersubcategory,azure_instance_type}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND azure_pricing_term:Spot AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {metersubcategory,azure_instance_type}.rollup(sum, daily)

definition.title: Azure GPU Spend by Machine Type (Daily)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {metersubcategory}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {team}.rollup(sum, monthly)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

definition.content: GCP GPU spend covers **GPU usage types** and GPU-accelerated machine specs (**a2, g2, a3** families). Promotional credits are excluded. Coverage is shown by consumption model (Default = On-Demand, CUD = Committed Use Discount).

definition.title: GCP GPU Spend by Machine Spec

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec}

definition.title: GCP GPU Spend by Usage Type

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {google_usage_type}

definition.title: GCP GPU Spend by Machine Type

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:a3*) AND NOT google_usage_type:*Commitment* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{providername IN (gcp) AND NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name} by {team}.rollup(sum, monthly)

definition.content:
Unused GPU Spend **includes**:
- Cluster idle cost (unallocated GPU capacity)
- Workload idle cost (allocated but underutilized)
- Unused On-Demand Capacity Reservations (AWS)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{allocated_spend_type IN (cluster_idle,workload_idle) AND allocated_resource:gpu AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND aws_usage_type:*Unused* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query5
queries.query: sum:all.cost{((allocated_resource:gpu AND allocated_spend_type IN (cluster_idle,workload_idle)) OR (aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND aws_usage_type:*Unused*)) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{allocated_resource:gpu,allocated_spend_type:cluster_idle,$availability-zone,$team,$kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:all.cost{allocated_resource:gpu,allocated_spend_type:workload_idle,$availability-zone,$team,$kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND aws_usage_type:*Unused* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

definition.title: Workload Idle GPU Cost by Namespace

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{allocated_resource:gpu,allocated_spend_type:workload_idle,$availability-zone,$team,$kube_cluster_name} by {kube_namespace}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{allocated_spend_type IN (cluster_idle,workload_idle) AND allocated_resource:gpu AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, monthly)

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND aws_usage_type:*Unused* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, monthly)

queries.name: query5
queries.query: sum:all.cost{((allocated_resource:gpu AND allocated_spend_type IN (cluster_idle,workload_idle)) OR (aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND aws_usage_type:*Unused*)) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances") AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, daily)

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}.rollup(sum, daily)

definition.content:
Allocated GPU Spend **excludes**:
- Unused On-Demand Capacity Reservations
- Cluster idle costs

Cost allocation works with Kubernetes and GPU monitoring data.

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{allocated_resource:gpu,!allocated_spend_type:cluster_idle,$availability-zone,$team,$kube_cluster_name}

definition.title: % of GPU Spend Allocated to Workloads

queries.name: query5
queries.query: sum:all.cost{allocated_resource:gpu,!allocated_spend_type:cluster_idle,$availability-zone,$team,$kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:aws.cost.net.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{(aws_instance_family IN ("GPU instance","Machine Learning ASIC Instances")) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query2
queries.query: sum:azure.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{chargetype IN (Usage) AND azure_product:VirtualMachines AND metersubcategory:*N* AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query3
queries.query: sum:gcp.cost.amortized.shared.resources.allocated{NOT credits_type:PROMOTION AND NOT google_usage_type:*PD* AND NOT google_usage_type:*Transfer* AND (google_usage_type:*GPU* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*g2* OR compute.googleapis.com/machine_spec:*a3*) AND $availability-zone AND $team AND $kube_cluster_name}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{allocated_resource:gpu,!allocated_spend_type:cluster_idle,$availability-zone,$team,$kube_cluster_name} by {kube_namespace}

queries.name: query1
queries.query: sum:all.cost{allocated_resource:gpu,!allocated_spend_type:cluster_idle,$availability-zone,$team,$kube_cluster_name} by {kube_namespace}.rollup(sum, daily)
